title: Tonzscrow: Decentralized Escrow API
description: A robust Web3 backend service built with Go and PostgreSQL that facilitates trustless transactions. Integrates directly with Ton smart contracts to hold and release funds based on multi-sig approvals.

title: AI-Powered RAG Microservice
description: An asynchronous Node.js microservice utilizing RabbitMQ and OpenAI's API. It ingests thousands of PDF documents, chunks them, stores embeddings in a vector database, and serves highly accurate context-aware responses.

title: High-Frequency Trading Websocket
description: A low-latency real-time data streaming pipeline built in Rust and Next.js. Capable of handling 10k+ concurrent connections streaming live crypto market data with less than 50ms latency.

title: Tonzilla
description: A Telegram mini app for private file sharing, allowing users to securely upload, encrypt, and share files directly within the Telegram interface.

title: Netra.ng
description: A comprehensive ISP management dashboard and captive portal system. It handles user authentication, billing, and bandwidth allocation by interfacing directly with a cloud-hosted TP-Link Omada SDN controller, seamlessly managing network traffic across ER605 routers and EAP 650 access points.

title: Allwebtool
description: A centralized directory and aggregator for multiple useful AI tools from around the web, offering a single streamlined interface for users to discover and interact with various AI models.

title: Morm
description: Morm is a powerful Object Document Mapper (ODM) for Golang, inspired by Mongoose, designed to be developer-friendly and feature-rich for seamless MongoDB integration.

title: Dehub.io
description: A Web3 video streaming platform that leverages decentralized storage and blockchain technology to give creators censorship-resistant content distribution and direct monetization.

title: Sociallio
description: An advanced marketing automation system that allows users to schedule posts, track analytics, and manage multiple social media accounts from a single unified dashboard.
